workflow.name: Onboard new hires with GPT-4, Notion, Jira, Google Drive, Gmail and Slack
workflow.description:
## ⚖️ HR Sovereign: AI-Powered Onboarding Hub

A high-fidelity employee onboarding engine: Intake → Role-Based Enrichment → AI Personalization → IT Provisioning.

### ⚙️ Core Sovereign Logic
* **Enrichment:** Auto-classifies Tech, Sales, and Leadership roles to drive specific logic tracks.
* **Intelligence:** Uses **AI Agent (GPT-4)** to generate personalized welcome messaging based on job DNA.
* **Atomization:** **Merge PDF** node assembles role-specific policies and benefits into a single high-res package.
* **Provisioning:** Dynamically generates **Jira** hardware/access tickets and **Notion** tracking dashboards.
* **Delivery:** Sends branded HTML emails via **Gmail** and announces hires on **Slack**.

### 📋 Setup & Prerequisites
1. **Intake:** Connect your HRIS (BambooHR/Workday) to the Webhook URL.
2. **Assets:** Organize Drive folders into "Technical", "Leadership", and "Standard" templates.
3. **Tracking:** Connect your Notion Onboarding Database and Jira IT Project.

**Metrics:** `Time_to_Provision`, `Engagement_Score`, `Document_Integrity_Hash`.

parameters.content:
### 📥 INTAKE & ENRICHMENT
Webhook receives data, validates fields, classifies role, determines systems access

### 🤖 AI & TRACKING
Notion tracker + AI-generated personalized welcome message

### 🔄 DATA CONSOLIDATION
Merge AI content with PDF package, archive to Drive

### ✅ DELIVERY & NOTIFICATIONS
IT provisioning, welcome email, Slack announcement

parameters.message:
=

Welcome to the Team! 🎉

Hi {{ $json.firstName }},

{{ $node["AI: Generate Personal Welcome"].json.content[0].text }}

Your Quick Start Guide

📋 Your Details:

  • Employee ID: {{ $json.employeeId }}
  • Job Title: {{ $json.jobTitle }}
  • Department: {{ $json.department }}
  • Start Date: {{ $json.startDate }}

🖥️ IT Setup in Progress:

Our IT team has been notified and is preparing your workspace. You'll have access to:

{{ $json.requiredSystems.map(s => `✓ ${s}`).join('') }}

Expected completion: {{ $json.itProvisioningTicket.estimatedCompletionDays }} business days

📦 Attached Documents:

Please review the attached onboarding package which includes:

  • Company policies and procedures
  • Benefits information
  • Department-specific guidelines
  • Code of conduct

📅 First Day Checklist:

  1. Arrive at 9:00 AM (or join the virtual onboarding session)
  2. Check in at reception (they're expecting you!)
  3. Meet your manager and team
  4. Complete HR paperwork
  5. Set up your workspace
  6. Attend new hire orientation at 2:00 PM

If you have any questions before your start date, don't hesitate to reach out to hr@company.com

We're excited to have you on board!

Best regards,
The HR Team

This is an automated message from the HR Onboarding System
parameters.subject: =🎉 Welcome to the team, {{ $json.firstName }}!

parameters.content:
## 🚀 How it works
This intelligent onboarding workflow automates the entire new hire process from webhook trigger to day-one readiness. It enriches employee data with role-based classifications, creates a **Notion tracking dashboard**, generates **AI-personalized welcome messages**, fetches and merges role-specific policy documents, provisions IT systems via **Jira tickets**, archives everything to Google Drive, sends beautiful HTML welcome emails with all documents attached, and announces the new hire on Slack.

**Key Intelligence:**
- Auto-detects tech, sales, finance, or management roles
- Generates custom system access requirements
- Creates detailed hardware provisioning lists
- Calculates onboarding completion timelines
- AI writes personalized welcome messages

## ⚙️ Setup steps
1. **Webhook**: Point your HRIS (BambooHR, Workday, etc.) to the webhook URL
2. **Notion**: Create an onboarding database with fields: Employee Name, Email, Job Title, Department, Start Date, Employee ID, Onboarding Status
3. **Google Drive**: 
   - Set up template folders with "Technical", "Leadership", "Standard" subfolders
   - Configure employee folder structure
4. **Anthropic AI**: Add your API key for personalized message generation
5. **HTML to PDF**: Add API credentials for document merging
6. **Jira**: Connect to your IT project and configure issue types
7. **Gmail**: Authenticate to send HTML emails with attachments
8. **Slack**: Set the #new-hires channel for announcements
9. **Code Logic**: Customize role keywords and system access requirements

### 📄 DOCUMENT PROCESSING
Fetch role-based templates, download policies, merge into single PDF package
